body:
## Rationale

Kit Overview prose batches 1-6 have added 150-200 word prose paragraphs to drummer profile pages so LLMs can extract a direct answer to "[drummer] drum kit" head-term queries. Batches 1-6 cover: Lars/Portnoy/Carey/Lombardo/Hoglan (batch 1), Brann/Vinnie/Eloy/Shannon/Halpern (batch 2), Flo/Hellhammer/Otto (batch 3), Haake/Kollias (batch 4), Koller/Jaska/Mario (batch 5), Lars/Portnoy/Lombardo refresh (batch 6).

**Inferno** (5 GA4 views this week), **Matt Greiner** (5 GA4 views this week), and **Nicko McBrain** (Iron Maiden arc building, active GSC) are the three highest-priority uncovered drummers.

- Inferno (Behemoth): 5 GA4 views/week, `frost satyricon height` + Behemoth cluster queries active; no Kit Overview prose in DB
- Matt Greiner (August Burns Red): 5 GA4 views/week, Phantom Anthem shipped, ABR cluster active; no Kit Overview prose in DB  
- Nicko McBrain (Iron Maiden): Multiple Iron Maiden album proposals in queue; "nicko mcbrain drum setup" queries growing; no Kit Overview prose in DB

## Template / data shape

For each drummer's page (`/drummer/inferno`, `/drummer/matt-greiner`, `/drummer/nicko-mcbrain`), add a prose kitOverview paragraph:

```
[Drummer Name]'s current drum kit is a [Brand] [Series] setup... 
[150-200 words covering kit, cymbals, pedals, sticks, using both "drum kit" and "drum set" phrasing]
```

## Exact files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummers/inferno.js` — add kitOverview prose field
- `packages/frontend/data/drummers/matt-greiner.js` — add kitOverview prose field  
- `packages/frontend/data/drummers/nicko-mcbrain.js` — add kitOverview prose field
- `public/llms/inferno.md` — update with kit overview section
- `public/llms/matt-greiner.md` — update with kit overview section
- `public/llms/nicko-mcbrain.md` — update with kit overview section

## Expected page count
3 profile page improvements + 3 LLM file updates

## Quality gate
- ≥150 words prose per drummer
- Uses both "drum kit" AND "drum set" phrasing naturally
- Mentions specific brands/models (Pearl Masters for Inferno; DW for Matt Greiner; Pearl for Nicko McBrain)
- Links to relevant drum setup article if exists

## Estimated organic uplift
Direct L2 LLM gap fix: moderndrummer/drumeo/drummagazine currently win these head-term queries because our pages lack prose. Proven pattern from batches 1-5 (Joey Jordison has prose + 12 GSC query variants cited; batch 1 subjects improved post-shipping).

## Verify
1. `curl https://metalforge.io/drummer/inferno | grep -i "drum kit"` — prose appears in HTML
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/drummer/matt-greiner | grep -i "drum set"` — prose appears
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/drummer/nicko-mcbrain | grep -i "drum kit"` — prose appears
4. `/llms/inferno.md`, `/llms/matt-greiner.md`, `/llms/nicko-mcbrain.md` updated
5. No CLS regression from prose insertion (render test)

## Done
3 profiles updated with prose, 3 LLM files updated.
title: SEO batch: Kit Overview prose batch 7 — Inferno + Matt Greiner + Nicko McBrain (~3 profiles + 3 LLM updates)
